programme.desc:
With a cross-wind and those 1.8m waves, you might get lucky if you enjoy closing out.
🌊 Swell: 1.8m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 7.0km/h W (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 15.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m
